title: Youtube poop: Death Note
description:
*Edit* I decided to change the title into something nice and unoriginal! (the other title sucked anyway)

FAILED TITLE ATTEMPT. So anyway, Light is actually a seagull in disguise, and when he fails to become the next Susan Boyle, he realizes that the only way he can realize his childhood dream and achieve world peace is by creating a new world order in which everyone is forced to listen to his horrible, err, wonderful singing all day long. LONG LIVE KIRA THE NOT HYPNOTOAD.

Previous title: L watches too much television while Seagull Kira calls out for his/her children
